problem: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation?
hypothesis: If Magnetohydrodynamic flow without moving parts is applied to chemical, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
